# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Primitive = string | number | boolean;
type JsonValue = Primitive | null | JsonValue[] | { [key: string]: JsonValue };

type UserRecord = {
  userId: string;
  name?: string;
  email?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
  country?: string;
  age?: number;
  createdAt?: string;
  [key: string]: JsonValue;
};

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const json = (body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) =>
  new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    ...init,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      "cache-control": "no-store",
      ...(init.headers ?? {}),
    },
  });

const badRequest = (message: string) => json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });
const notFound = (message: string) => json({ error: message }, { status: 404 });

function isSafeKeyPart(value: string): boolean {
  return /^[a-zA-Z0-9._:@-]{1,128}$/.test(value);
}

function normalizeKeyPart(value: string): string {
  return value.trim().toLowerCase();
}

function parseValue(value: string): Primitive {
  const v = value.trim();
  if (v === "true") return true;
  if (v === "false") return false;
  if (/^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(v)) return Number(v);
  return v;
}

function toIndexKeyValue(value: JsonValue): Primitive | null {
  if (
    typeof value === "string" ||
    typeof value === "number" ||
    typeof value === "boolean"
  ) return value;
  return null;
}

function pickSearchFilters(url: URL): Record<string, Primitive> {
  const filters: Record<string, Primitive> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (key === "limit" || key === "cursor" || key === "userId") continue;
    const normalizedKey = normalizeKeyPart(key);
    if (!isSafeKeyPart(normalizedKey)) continue;
    filters[normalizedKey] = parseValue(value);
  }
  return filters;
}

async function putUser(user: UserRecord) {
  if (!user.userId) throw new Error("userId is required");

  const userId = normalizeKeyPart(String(user.userId));
  if (!isSafeKeyPart(userId)) throw new Error("invalid userId");

  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const normalized: UserRecord = {
    ...user,
    userId,
    createdAt: user.createdAt ?? now,
  };

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.set(["users", userId], normalized);

  for (const [field, raw] of Object.entries(normalized)) {
    if (field === "userId") continue;
    const filterParam = normalizeKeyPart(field);
    if (!isSafeKeyPart(filterParam)) continue;

    const indexValue = toIndexKeyValue(raw);
    if (indexValue === null) continue;

    atomic.set(["users", userId, filterParam], indexValue);
    atomic.set(["users_by_filter", filterParam, indexValue, userId], true);
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error("failed to write user");
  return normalized;
}

async function getUser(userId: string) {
  const id = normalizeKeyPart(userId);
  const entry = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", id]);
  return entry.value;
}

async function searchUsers(url: URL) {
  const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
  const limit = Math.min(
    Math.max(Number(url.searchParams.get("limit") ?? "50") || 50, 1),
    200,
  );
  const filters = pickSearchFilters(url);

  if (userId) {
    const id = normalizeKeyPart(userId);
    if (!isSafeKeyPart(id)) return badRequest("invalid userId");

    if (Object.keys(filters).length === 1) {
      const [filterParam] = Object.keys(filters);
      if (!isSafeKeyPart(filterParam)) return badRequest("invalid filter key");

      const directKey = ["users", id, filterParam];
      const direct = await kv.get<Primitive>(directKey);
      const full = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", id]);

      return json({
        lookup: {
          key: directKey,
          value: direct.value,
        },
        user: full.value,
      });
    }

    const full = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", id]);
    if (!full.value) return notFound("user not found");

    const matches = Object.entries(filters).every(([k, v]) => {
      const current = full.value?.[k];
      return current === v;
    });

    return json({
      items: matches ? [full.value] : [],
      count: matches ? 1 : 0,
      filters,
    });
  }

  const filterEntries = Object.entries(filters);

  if (filterEntries.length === 0) {
    const items: UserRecord[] = [];
    for await (const entry of kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix: ["users"] })) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2) items.push(entry.value);
      if (items.length >= limit) break;
    }
    return json({ items, count: items.length, filters: {} });
  }

  const [firstFilterKey, firstFilterValue] = filterEntries[0];
  if (!isSafeKeyPart(firstFilterKey)) return badRequest("invalid filter key");

  const candidateIds: string[] = [];
  for await (
    const entry of kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users_by_filter", firstFilterKey, firstFilterValue],
    })
  ) {
    const key = entry.key;
    const id = String(key[key.length - 1]);
    candidateIds.push(id);
    if (candidateIds.length >= limit * 10) break;
  }

  const items: UserRecord[] = [];
  for (const id of candidateIds) {
    const user = await getUser(id);
    if (!user) continue;

    const matches = filterEntries.every(([k, v]) => user[k] === v);
    if (matches) items.push(user);
    if (items.length >= limit) break;
  }

  return json({
    items,
    count: items.length,
    filters,
    indexLookup: ["users_by_filter", firstFilterKey, firstFilterValue],
  });
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const id = normalizeKeyPart(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(["users", id]);
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(["users", id]);

  for (const [field, raw] of Object.entries(existing.value)) {
    if (field === "userId") continue;
    const filterParam = normalizeKeyPart(field);
    if (!isSafeKeyPart(filterParam)) continue;

    const indexValue = toIndexKeyValue(raw);
    if (indexValue === null) continue;

    atomic.delete(["users", id, filterParam]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_filter", filterParam, indexValue, id]);
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  return res.ok;
}

serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, "") || "/";

    if (req.method === "POST" && pathname === "/users") {
      const body = await req.json();
      const user = await putUser(body as UserRecord);
      return json({ ok: true, user }, { status: 201 });
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/users/search") {
      return await searchUsers(url);
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = pathname.split("/")[2];
      if (!userId) return badRequest("missing userId");
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      if (!user) return notFound("user not found");
      return json({ user });
    }

    if (req.method === "DELETE" && pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = pathname.split("/")[2];
      if (!userId) return badRequest("missing userId");
      const ok = await deleteUser(userId);
      if (!ok) return notFound("user not found");
      return json({ ok: true });
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/") {
      return json({
        ok: true,
        routes: {
          createUser: "POST /users",
          getUser: "GET /users/:userId",
          deleteUser: "DELETE /users/:userId",
          searchUsers: "GET /users/search?status=active&role=admin",
          directDynamicKeyLookup: "GET /users/search?userId=u1&status=active",
        },
      });
    }

    return notFound("route not found");
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "internal error" },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
